recommendation: Add a single optional study_family filter, plus countable_as_independent_cohort only if populated. Keep family fields out of default columns.
rationale: Users need to avoid overcounting while browsing, but the main table is already dense.

recommendation: Show study_family, family_role, component_of, countable_as_independent_cohort, and overlap_note.
rationale: Best place for the actual warning: visible when a user inspects a row, without cluttering every row.

recommendation: Add a short Cohort-family and overcounting rules section with links to review artifacts.
rationale: This is where users should learn that rows are accessions/modalities, not always independent cohorts.

recommendation: Keep it task/status oriented. Add links to completed overlap-review artifacts only.
rationale: Good for provenance of review work, not for end-user filtering.

recommendation: Keep detailed artifacts here: cohort_overlap_audit.csv, protect_overlap_review.csv, risk_overlap_review.csv, ibd200_overlap_review.csv, and future family audits.
rationale: Full audit evidence is useful to curators and power users, but too detailed for the main UI.

recommendation: Do not surface cohort-family logic here, except as download links if needed.
rationale: That page is about external resource coverage, not cohort independence.

recommendation: Sample counts should not be summed across rows sharing the same study_family unless countable_as_independent_cohort is explicitly Yes.
rationale: This prevents false cohort-size inflation while preserving accession-level discoverability.
